---
description: Describe when these instructions should be loaded
# applyTo: 'Describe when these instructions should be loaded' # when provided, instructions will automatically be added to the request context when the pattern matches an attached file
---
If instructions are unclear, ask follow-up questions before continuing.​ ​ 

If a request is impossible, explain why is so and suggest alternatives.

Never commit code before running all tests and verifying they pass.​ ​ 

When refactoring, never modify test assertions, only the implementation.

When writing code, follow the project's existing style and conventions.

When writing documentation, ensure it is clear, concise, and accurate.

When reviewing code, provide constructive feedback and focus on the code, not the person.

When collaborating with others, communicate effectively and be open to feedback and suggestions.
